caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 24 kt winds with 6.6 ft wave heights and a 38% rain probability, while nearby ports have significantly calmer conditions, such as Martinique with 12 kt winds. I expect the Western Caribbean to see the most impactful weather today, with the ENE swell direction contributing to the rough seas around Roatan.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northwest swells with a dominant period of 6 seconds and wave heights reaching 5.1 ft, under less than 10% rain probability, with winds gusting up to 21 kt. Naples, in contrast, will see much calmer conditions, with winds of only 9 kt and no significant wave action, also with less than 10% rain probability.
